facts.date: First weekend of February (during Jokkmokk Winter Market)

distance_km.note: No sources mention a 42km Jokkmokk Winter Marathon; all refer to Nordenskiöldsloppet (220km) or a FIS event without distance specified. No confirmation found for claimed race.

elevation_m.note: No reliable sources provide elevation gain for any Jokkmokk ski race matching the description.

country.note: Sources confirm Jokkmokk races in Sweden, but no match for 'Jokkmokk Winter Marathon'.

region_state_province.note: Jokkmokk is in Norrbotten, Sweden per sources, but no specific match for claimed race.

discipline.note: Nordenskiöldsloppet is classic technique[1][2][4], but no info on claimed race.

field_size.note: Nordenskiöldsloppet has ~340 participants[5]; no data on claimed race or 200 participants.

founded.note: Nordenskiöldsloppet modern edition started 2016 (8th in 2025, 9th in 2026)[1][4]; historic 1884[2]; no 1985 match.

official_website.note: No source confirms https://www.jokkmokksvintertid.se for this race; Nordenskiöldsloppet site is nordenskioldsloppet.com[4].

race_date.note: Nordenskiöldsloppet late March[1][4]; Jokkmokk Winter Market is first weekend February, but no link to ski marathon.
